lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur naam nidhaan drirraaeaa |
lines.english: The True Guru implanted the treasure of the Naam within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਹਲਾਦੁ ਜਨੁ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗਾ ਆਇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: prahalaad jan charanee laagaa aae |11|
lines.english: The humble servant Prahlaad came and fell at the Lord's Feet. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੁ ਮਾਲੁ ਝੂਠੀ ਸਭ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raaj maal jhootthee sabh maaeaa |
lines.english: Power, property and all Maya is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭੀ ਨਰ ਰਹੇ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lobhee nar rahe lapattaae |
lines.english: But still, the greedy people continue clinging to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: har ke naam bin daragah milai sajaae |12|
lines.english: Without the Name of the Lord, the mortals are punished in His Court. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਗੀਕਾਰੁ ਕਰਦਾ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kaa angeekaar karadaa aaeaa |
lines.english: He has made His devotees His Own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kahai naanak sabh ko kare karaaeaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, everyone acts as the Lord makes them act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਜਿਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: se paravaan jinee har siau chit laaeaa |
lines.english: They alone are approved and accepted, who focus their consciousness on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te amrit fal paaeaa haumai trisan bujhaaee |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, I obtain the Ambrosial Fruit; my egotism and desire have been quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤੈ ਅਪਣਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥੧੩॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: karatai apanaa roop dikhaaeaa |13|1|2|
lines.english: The Creator has appeared in His Own Form. ||13||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਹ੍ਰਿਦੈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam hridai man vasiaa manasaa maneh samaaee |1|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord dwells within my heart and mind, and the desires of my mind are quieted. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo kripaa karahu mere piaare |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, my Beloved, please bless me with Your Mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਦੀਨ ਜਨੁ ਮਾਂਗੈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਉਧਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anadin har gun deen jan maangai gur kai sabad udhaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Night and day, Your humble servant begs for Your Glorious Praises; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he is saved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਰਤੀ ਅੰਚ ਦੂਖ ਨ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kau jam johi na saakai ratee anch dookh na laaee |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death cannot even touch the humble Saints; it does not cause them even an iota of suffering or pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰਹਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰਹਿ ਜੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap tareh sagale kul taareh jo teree saranaaee |2|
lines.english: Those who enter Your Sanctuary, Lord, save themselves, and save all their ancestors as well. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਦੁਖ ਕਾਟਹਿ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਰਤੀ ਨ ਰਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilavikh dukh kaatteh dubidhaa ratee na raaee |3|
lines.english: You cleanse them of the sins and the pains of countless incarnations; You love them without even an iota of duality. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਹਿ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਏਹ ਤੇਰੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kee paij rakheh too aape eeh teree vaddiaaee |
lines.english: You Yourself save the honor of Your devotees; this is Your Glory, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਸੀ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai soee karasee avar na karanaa jaaee |4|
lines.english: You do whatever You please; nothing else can be done at all. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਮੂੜ ਮੁਗਧ ਕਿਛੁ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ham moorr mugadh kichh boojheh naahee too aape dehi bujhaaee |
lines.english: I am foolish and ignorant, and understand nothing. You Yourself bless me with understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਤੁਧੁ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇਆ ਭੂੰਡੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jagat upaae tudh dhandhai laaeaa bhoonddee kaar kamaaee |
lines.english: Creating the world, You have linked all to their tasks - even the evil deeds which men do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਮਰਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh mareh tin kichhoo na soojhai duramat agiaan andhaaraa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs die, understanding nothing; they are enveloped by the darkness of evil-mindedness and ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਜੂਐ ਹਾਰਿਆ ਸਬਦੈ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath jooai haariaa sabadai surat na paaee |5|
lines.english: They lose this precious human life in the gamble, and do not understand the Word of the Shabad. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਜਨ ਸਾਚੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saachai sabad rate jan saache har prabh aap milaae |
lines.english: True are those humble beings who are imbued with the True Shabad; the Lord God unites them with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਕਬ ਹੀ ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸਿਰਿ ਭਾਰਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bhavajal paar na paaveh kab hee ddoob mue bin gur sir bhaaraa |6|
lines.english: They do not cross over the terrible world-ocean; without the Guru, they drown and die. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤੀ ਸਾਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee sabad pachhaatee saach rahe liv laae |7|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Bani, they come to understand the Shabad. They remain lovingly focused on the True Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਤੇਰੇ ਜਨ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: toon aap niramal tere jan hai niramal gur kai sabad veechaare |
lines.english: You Yourself are Immaculate and Pure, and pure are Your humble servants who contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੇ ॥੮॥੨॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak tin kai sad balihaarai raam naam ur dhaare |8|2|3|
lines.english: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to those, who enshrine the Lord's Name within their hearts. ||8||2||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 5 asattapadeea ghar 2 |
lines.english: Bhairao, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਸੋਈ ਵਡ ਰਾਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai soee vadd raajaa |
lines.english: He alone is a great king, who keeps the Naam, the Name of the Lord, within his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਨਿ ਕੋਟਿ ਧਨ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tin kott dhan paae |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart, obtains millions of treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਪੂਰੇ ਕਾਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis poore kaajaa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart - his tasks are perfectly accomplished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis saalaahee jis har dhan raas |
lines.english: I praise that person, who has the capital of the Lord's Wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam binaa janam birathaa jaae |1|
lines.english: Without the Naam, life is useless. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹਾਥੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so vaddabhaagee jis gur masatak haath |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is very fortunate, on whose forehead the Guru has placed His Hand. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੈਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis sehaj sukhainaa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart, enjoys peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੋਟ ਕਈ ਸੈਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam ridai tis kott kee sainaa |
lines.english: One who keeps the Naam in his heart, has many millions of armies on his side.
